document_info.document_type: Excel Submission Data (Locations, Prior Insurance, Named Insureds, Loss Summary)

business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial property ownership and management including warehouse/logistics, manufacturing, flex space, and office facilities across Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: TIV of $251,345,000 across 9 locations. Coverage includes Building Value, Contents, and Business Interruption. Prior carriers include Hartford Financial Services and Chubb Limited.

positives: Majority of locations are Non-Combustible or Masonry Non-Combustible construction
8 of 9 locations have sprinkler systems installed
Portfolio is relatively modern with most buildings constructed between 2004 and 2019
4 consecutive years of low claim activity (0 claims in 2022, 2023, and 2024)
Diverse roof types across portfolio indicating varied construction quality and age
All locations are single-story, reducing vertical spread-of-fire risk
Premium trend shows decreasing premiums from 2021 to 2024, suggesting favorable underwriting history
concerns: LOC-007 (Toledo Industrial Park - Building 2) has no sprinkler system
LOC-004 (Dayton Manufacturing Facility) is Joisted Masonry construction — oldest and highest fire risk construction class in portfolio
LOC-004 was built in 1992, the oldest building in the portfolio
LOC-007 was built in 1998 and combines non-sprinklered status with Manufacturing occupancy
Property claims incurred ($238,554) exceed paid ($202,875), indicating open/reserved losses
2021 had 1 property claim; total loss history shows 2 claims with $238,554 total incurred
Highly concentrated geographic exposure — all 9 locations in Ohio, creating single-state catastrophe aggregation risk
Large concentration of TIV in Columbus/Rickenbacker corridor (LOC-001 and LOC-002 represent $104,650,000 combined TIV)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 4-year loss history showing 2 property claims total with $202,875 paid and $238,554 incurred. One claim occurred in 2021 under Hartford Financial Services. No claims reported in 2022, 2023, or 2024. Approximately $35,679 in open reserves.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC is the primary named insured for a portfolio of 9 industrial and commercial properties located throughout Ohio. The portfolio includes warehouse/logistics centers, manufacturing facilities, flex space, and a corporate administrative office. Total Insured Value is $251,345,000. The account has been with Liberty Mutual Insurance in 2024 at a premium of $392,002.31 with no claims that year.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Portfolio consists of: 5 warehouse/logistics facilities (LOC-001 through LOC-003, LOC-005, LOC-008), 2 manufacturing facilities (LOC-004, LOC-007), 1 flex space (LOC-008), and 1 corporate administrative office (LOC-009). Locations span Columbus, Brooklyn, Dayton, Cincinnati, Toledo, Uniontown, and Columbus (office). Square footage ranges from 8,500 SF (corporate office) to 425,000 SF (Rickenbacker Logistics Center - A). Total square footage is approximately 1,953,500 SF across all locations.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: 8 of 9 locations are equipped with automatic sprinkler systems. The sole non-sprinklered location is LOC-007 (Toledo Industrial Park - Building 2), a 1998-built manufacturing facility.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Over the past 4 policy years, the account has experienced 2 property claims with $202,875 paid and $238,554 incurred. The single reported claim event occurred in 2021 during the Hartford Financial Services policy period. The subsequent 3 years (2022, 2023, 2024) were claim-free. There is approximately $35,679 in outstanding incurred-but-not-fully-paid reserves.
